## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] UAT tests pass (`make uat`)
- [ ] New tests added for changes
- [ ] Security review completed (if applicable)
- [ ] Agent evaluation passes (`make eval`) (if agent changes)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`make e2e`) (if frontend changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (ruff for Python, TypeScript strict mode)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] External data wrapped in `<external-data>` tags (if agent-facing)
- [ ] RBAC permissions added for new endpoints
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Alembic migration included (if DB schema changed)
- [ ] Backward compatible (or breaking change documented above)
